subject: Q3 forecast — your input by Friday?

messages.body: Hi Aaryan, the leadership team is finalizing the Q3 forecast and we need your numbers for the platform team by Friday EOD. Specifically: hiring plan, infra spend, and the projected impact of the migration project. Anything blocking?
Got it — will turn it around tomorrow. One thing to flag: the migration was pushed by two weeks, so the cost savings won't show up until late Q3.
Thanks. Can you also confirm the new headcount target? I have 3 in the plan but I think you mentioned 4 last week. Also, is the storage refactor in or out of Q3?

user_intent: Reply confirming headcount as 4, note that storage refactor is in Q3 but only Phase 1, and acknowledge the Friday deadline.
